prompt:
Atmosphere of an idol live photo, stage presence, hairstyle direction, and expression. Do not copy the face, clothing, accessories, or pose of a real person. Generate as a new, original adult female idol.

Portrait 3:4, photorealistic, high resolution, live stage shot, shallow depth of field, background is pink to purple stage lights with soft bokeh, other members and audience blurred. A "once-in-a-millennium idol miracle shot" feel, fleeting and romantic, transparent, elegant cuteness, dreamy stage photo.

Subject: Adult female idol, long brown hair, thin bangs, soft expression, large clear eyes, natural healthy complexion, light pink makeup, realistic skin texture, excessive AI porcelain skin prohibited. Holding the microphone gently with both hands, looking slightly upwards while singing. Mouth slightly open with an emotional singing expression. Pose is quiet and elegant, fingertips are natural and beautiful.

Clothing: Navy x pink outfit, giant pink ribbon, silver ruffled sleeves, beret; choker is prohibited. Change to completely different attire.

New Outfit: Romantic idol dress in dusty rose pink and cream white. Layered tulle, satin-style corset bodice, 3D light rose flower decorations, scalloped sleeves, sheer ruffled sleeves, delicate lace, small rose decorations on chest and waist. Skirt is soft tulle layers, light pink and cream gradient, elegant shimmer.

Accessories: Pearl cluster earrings, rose motif hair vine, lace wrist cuffs, small heart pendant choker, thin belt with jewel charms. All unified in light, romantic colors to match the outfit.

Photography: Stage lights are soft pink, lavender, and light purple. Beautiful catchlight in the eyes, skin is natural, eyes are sharp. A realistic live photo like one miraculously captured by an event photographer. Excessive fantasy, feathers, crystals, magic effects, and anime-style shading are prohibited. No text, logos, or watermarks.
